title: Probing the Electronic Structure at the Boundary of Topological Insulators in the $\mathrm{Bi}_2\mathrm{Se}_3$ Family by Combined STM and AFM
type1_summary: No figure-ready cleaned data files were identified.

classification_notes: There is a strong mismatch between the stated paper topic (Bi2Se3 STM/AFM and DFT+GW) and the archive contents (stellar modeling/GYRE/MESA-related files). Because of this apparent misassociation, classifications are conservative and based on file function rather than presumed relevance to the paper.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports crystal growth and magneto-transport measurements on Ni$_3$In$_2$S$_2$ single crystals, identifying weak anti-localization and topological-insulator-like behavior at low temperature.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper likely contains experimental crystal growth and magneto-transport measurement data, but no accessible dataset or supplementary/source data was identified from the available information.
